Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Leanstral: Open-source agent for trustworthy coding and formal proof engineering 316 upvotes, 59 comments
  2. In space, no one can hear you kernel panic (2020) 28 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. My Journey to a reliable and enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant (2025) 325 upvotes, 97 comments
  4. Lazycut: A simple terminal video trimmer using FFmpeg 157 upvotes, 51 comments
  5. Meta’s renewed commitment to jemalloc 352 upvotes, 144 comments
  6. The “small web” is bigger than you might think 321 upvotes, 136 comments
  7. Show HN: Thermal Receipt Printers – Markdown and Web UI 37 upvotes, 10 comments
  8. Why I love FreeBSD 357 upvotes, 167 comments
  9. US SEC preparing to scrap quarterly reporting requirement 276 upvotes, 133 comments
  10. Corruption erodes social trust more in democracies than in autocracies 666 upvotes, 350 comments
  11. Canopy Height Maps v2 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  12. Lies I was told about collaborative editing, Part 2: Why we don't use Yjs 205 upvotes, 101 comments
  13. On The Need For Understanding 88 upvotes, 38 comments
  14. Home Assistant waters my plants 253 upvotes, 131 comments
  15. Language Model Teams as Distrbuted Systems 72 upvotes, 32 comments
  16. Polymarket gamblers threaten to kill me over Iran missile story 1361 upvotes, 884 comments
  17. Kona EV Hacking 122 upvotes, 68 comments
  18. Show HN: Oxyde – Pydantic-native async ORM with a Rust core 71 upvotes, 37 comments
  19. Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games 175 upvotes, 108 comments
  20. Nvidia Launches Vera CPU, Purpose-Built for Agentic AI 132 upvotes, 80 comments
  21. US commercial insurers pay 254% of Medicare for the same hospital procedures 249 upvotes, 175 comments
  22. US Job Market Visualizer 425 upvotes, 318 comments
  23. Starlink Mini as a failover 204 upvotes, 166 comments
  24. Launch HN: Voygr (YC W26) – A better maps API for agents and AI apps 66 upvotes, 48 comments
  25. Apideck CLI – An AI-agent interface with much lower context consumption than MCP 122 upvotes, 107 comments
  26. The bureaucracy blocking the chance at a cure 96 upvotes, 119 comments
  27. AirPods Max 2 217 upvotes, 389 comments
  28. Show HN: GitClassic.com, a fast, lightweight GitHub thin client (pages <14KB) 7 upvotes, 6 comments
  29. Cert Authorities Check for DNSSEC from Today 89 upvotes, 211 comments
